prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次约130→837→1138→1449，呈逐年后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1319名；2025年基准约1449名。2021年因含护理学专业导致位次异常（29385），不纳入趋势判断；本省计划2021年12人、2022年11人、2023年13人、2024年15人、2025年15人；2026年计划15人，连续3年持平，无扩招或缩招信号。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；上海交通大学软科主榜约第4名，近年排名稳定，为国内顶尖医学院校；上海交通大学2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学校管理、师德师风、学术不端等事件，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度为较热（总排名第42位），关注度一般；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学A+、口腔医学A+、护理学A-等，均为顶尖学科，与该校招生专业（临床医学八年制、儿科学等）高度匹配，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学持续高热推荐（2024年），口腔医学推荐（72.31），医学类专业社会热度不减；本省2026年物理类考生约26.4万人，较2025年（26.0万）增加约1.45%，竞争略有加剧；上海交通大学医学院在广西招生占比约3.06%（2025年15人/全国490人），属中等水平；上海作为一线城市对广西考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生小幅增加及声誉偏负面等因素，在2025年基准1449名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约1429名，区间1257–1601名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读，口腔方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 儿科学（卓越班）/ 医学试验班（5+3一体化，儿科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无其他低分专业（该校在广西仅招临床医学八年制及儿科学两个方向，均为高分专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学医学院在广西招生专业极少（仅临床医学八年制本博连读、口腔方向、儿科学三个方向），均为顶尖医学专业。位次在预测区间（1257–1601名）内建议以二档儿科学为主攻方向、一档临床医学八年制为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（<1257名）可重点冲刺临床医学八年制及口腔方向。由于该校专业层次极高，建议同时准备其他医学院校作为保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 130 → 837 → 1138 → 1449, showing a trend of moving backward year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1319 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1449. In 2021, due to the inclusion of the nursing major, the ranking was abnormal (29385), which is not included in the trend judgment; the provincial enrollment plan was 12 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 15, unchanged for 3 consecutive years, with no signal of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Shanghai Jiao Tong University ranks approximately 4th on the Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in recent years, making it a top medical school in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation of Shanghai Jiao Tong University is somewhat negative, involving incidents related to school management, teacher ethics, academic misconduct, etc., which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 42nd overall), with average attention; no obvious enrollment gaps have been observed; Clinical Medicine A+, Stomatology A+, Nursing A-, etc., are all top-tier disciplines, highly matching the school's enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine 8-year program, Pediatrics, etc.), strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine continues to be highly recommended (2024), stomatology is recommended (72.31), and the social popularity of medical majors remains high; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in this province is approximately 264,000, an increase of about 1.45% compared to 2025 (260,000), slightly intensifying competition; Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine accounts for about 3.06% of enrollment in Guangxi (15 out of 490 nationally in 2025), which is a moderate level; Shanghai, as a first-tier city, has strong appeal to Guangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in provincial candidates, and the somewhat negative reputation, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1449; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1429, with a range of 1257–1601.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Clinical Medicine (8-year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program, Stomatology Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Pediatrics (Excellent Class) / Medical Experimental Class (5+3 Integrated, Pediatrics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- No other low-score majors currently (the school only recruits for Clinical Medicine 8-year program and Pediatrics in Guangxi, both high-score majors)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine has very few enrollment majors in Guangxi (only Clinical Medicine 8-year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program, Stomatology Direction, and Pediatrics), all of which are top-tier medical majors. If your ranking is within the predicted range (1257–1601), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Pediatrics as the main target and Tier 1 Clinical Medicine 8-year program as a reach; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1257), you can focus on reaching for Clinical Medicine 8-year program and Stomatology Direction. Due to the extremely high level of the school's majors, it is advisable to also prepare other medical schools as safety options.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
